title: The most viewed document in the FBI Vault!

transcript.text: the most read document on the FBI's
website is something called the Huddle
memo a 1950s memo about space aliens and
UFO crash is the FBI's most searched for
document online which is about uh a UFO
crash and um an Air Force officer finds
the UFO with the crew intact agent guy
hudle then head of the FBI's Washington
field office writes that an Air Force
investigator stated that three so-called
flying saucers had been recovered in New
Mexico they were described as being
circular in shape with raised centers
approximately 50 ft in diameter not only
that each one was occupied by three
bodies of human shape but only 3 ft tall
dressed in metallic cloth of a very fine
texture and so this again this document
could be fake but it's on the website
and it's it's you know been foed or
Declassified and it's it's there
